title: Add ability to bold/color code boards on left panel to draw attention
excerpt: It would be nice to be able to bold or color-code boars on the left panel to draw attention to key boards in a workspace.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to be able to bold or color-code boars on the left panel to draw attention to key boards in a workspace.
